hero.badge: ATS + HRIS + Payroll · with agentic AI
hero.subtitle: From job post to payslip in a single platform. One record that travels with you — never re-entered. AI does the busywork; your team makes the calls.
hero.tagline: One record · the full cycle · no re-entry
hero.hint: Real demo · click around the menu

dash.personalizeHint: Choose which metrics show in your pulse
dash.attentionSub: Actions assigned to you · precise signals, not estimates

rows.name: Elena Vidal · Sr Backend
rows.meta: Fit 95 · 6 days in Interview with no movement

dash.agentBody: On Sr Backend and Product Designer, LinkedIn converts 2× better (avg fit 78 vs 61 · 34 applications).

empleados.title: Directory · 24 people
empleados.bannerSub: Assign the role-based flow to every new hire

locked.body: This section lives in the full demo. Sign up and explore it with sample data, along with the rest of the product.
locked.foot: Dashboard · Jobs · Employees · Payroll are open in this demo

trust.label: We're opening early access to HR teams at mid-sized companies

problema.subtitle: One portal to post, a spreadsheet for candidates, a chat to decide, an HRIS for the employee, an outsourced bureau for payroll. And a trendy AI bolted on the side, outside the flow.
problema.cost1: It's not the licenses. It's that your data
problema.cost2: : the candidate you hire is typed in again as an employee, and once more as a payroll line.
problema.costFoot: You lose time, context, and traceability.

plataforma.subtitle: TalentOS unifies the entire talent lifecycle in one system where the pieces already talk to each other. A candidate becomes an employee and then a payslip without re-entering a single field.
plataforma.boardTitle: Data travels through the cycle — never typed twice
plataforma.foot: Click each stage of the cycle — the data travels and is only typed once.

ats.title: Recruiting
ats.desc: Post to every channel in one click, manage your candidate pipeline, and launch your public careers page.

hris.title: People
hris.desc: Directory and org chart, onboarding, time off, hours and schedules — with the employee record as the single source of truth.

pay.title: Payroll
pay.desc: Calculation engine, payslips and per-country compliance. No exporting to a payroll bureau.

previews.onbSub: Assign flows to every new hire

ia.title1: The AI isn't on the side.
ia.subtitle: It drafts the job post, builds your entire career site from your website, summarizes CVs and scores fit, recommends where to invest your budget, and assembles role-based onboarding checklists.

agents.title: Drafts the job post
agents.desc: Writes the vacancy copy and publishes it wherever you confirm.

agents.title: Career site from your website
agents.desc: Extracts your company profile and builds your entire careers page.

agents.title: Summarizes CVs, scores fit
agents.desc: Reads every application and proposes a fit score with evidence.

agents.title: Allocates the budget
agents.desc: Recommends which channel to invest in and builds role-based onboarding.

ia.trustBody: No agent publishes, hires or pays on its own. That's what makes the automation trustworthy — and compliance-friendly.

invariants.label: PREPARES
invariants.text: Drafts, extracts, calculates, summarizes — the mechanical work.

invariants.label: PROPOSES
invariants.text: With scope, evidence and one concrete action.

invariants.label: YOU DECIDE
invariants.text: You confirm or dismiss. The final write is always human.

cards.title: For leadership
points: Fewer HR hours spent copying data
Up and running in days, not months
Each company in its own isolated, secure workspace

cards.title: For HR
points: One clear pipeline — no CVs lost in email
One job post on all your channels in one click
From candidate to employee with no re-entry
Time off, hours and payroll in the same place
AI handles the repetitive work; you decide what matters

seguridad.body: Each company is a fully isolated workspace at the database level: you will never see another company's data. Access is governed by roles. And because the AI never writes on its own, sensitive data is protected by design.

roles.name: OWNER
roles.scope: Full access, including billing and payroll approval.

roles.name: HR ADMIN
roles.scope: All people operations, compensation and compliance.

roles.name: RECRUITER
roles.scope: Jobs, candidates and pipeline. No sensitive employee data.

roles.name: MANAGER
roles.scope: Only their slice of the org chart: their team and direct reports.

roles.name: EMPLOYEE
roles.scope: Their own record, hours and time off. Nothing else.

estado.body: The ATS, HRIS and payroll engine are built and in production. By design, money never flows automatically from recruiting to payroll: offer data only pre-fills what HR confirms at the moment of hire.

cards.title: ATS
cards.desc: Pipeline, jobs and career site built and in use.

cards.title: HRIS
cards.desc: Directory, employee records, time off, hours and schedules in production.

cards.title: Payroll engine
cards.desc: Calculation, payslips and the generic compliance pack are live.

cta.title1: From five tools and a lost day to
cta.body: AI does the busywork. Your team decides. From job post to payslip.
cta.sentBody: We'll email {email} with your early access.

footer.tagline: The talent operating system: ATS + HRIS + Payroll with agentic AI. One record, the full cycle, no re-entry.
footer.motto: One record · the full cycle · AI never writes alone
